title: Auntie Mame
writer: Betty Comden, Adolph Green, Patrick Dennis
actors: Rosalind Russell, Forrest Tucker, Coral Browne
plot: An orphan goes to live with his free-spirited aunt. Conflict ensues when the executor of his father's estate objects to the aunt's lifestyle.
awards: Nominated for 6 Oscars. 5 wins & 12 nominations total
